title: scRNA-seq protocol
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"fnut0","text":"scRNA-seq protocol for ESC DE differentiation time course","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Cells were harvested every 12h during DE differentiation for scRNA-seq experiments with targeted collection ranging from 3000 to 6000 cells.
Single-cell 3′ RNA-seq libraries were generated with 10x Genomics Chromium Single Cell 3′ Reagent Kit v.3 following the manufacturer’s guidelines using 10X chromium controller firmware v5.0.
The libraries were sequenced on NovaSeq 6000 platform following the manufacturer’s guidelines.
creator: Michael Beer
